text.title: Agent GA-Readiness Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-ga-readiness-checklist is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: GA shipped, rollback fails on first incident.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4: e2e-test rollback before flip.

antipattern.description: Checklist 'all green' but eval bar was a single green run.
Item left blank; team assumes someone did it.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: explicit skip + reason.
